case_title: GERALD JOHNSON MR. ET AL VS. RAPID CASH CLOSING LLC, ET AL

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON MR., GERALD JOHNSON MRS, MELBA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2015 - CONTINUED BY ORDER OF THE COURT TO APR-02-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PLAINTIFFS (GERALD JOHNSON AND MELBA JOHNSON) WERE PRESENT. THE DEFENDANTS (RAPID CASH CLOSING, LLC AND HITESH JADEV) WERE PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT, RAPID CASH CLOSING LLC WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH HITESH JADAV (TITLE: MEMBER). RAPID CASH CLOSING LLC WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. HITESH JADEV WAIVES NOT BEING SERVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RAPID CASH CLOSING LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JOHNSON MR., GERALD JOHNSON MRS, MELBA AS TO DEFENDANT RAPID CASH CLOSING LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFFS. THE DEFENDANTS (RAPID CASH CLOSING, LLC AND HITESH JADEV) WERE PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT, RAPID CASH CLOSING LLC WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH HITESH JADAV (TITLE: MEMBER). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT ON THE RECORD, D506
